title: TrayBuddy Mod Editor
welcome_desc: Click "Open Mod" to load an existing Mod folder or .tbuddy file, or click "New Mod" to create a brand new Mod
manifest_desc: Configure basic Mod info, character and border settings
mod_id_hint: Unique identifier, only alphanumeric characters allowed
char_canvas_fit_preference_hint: Controls how the character canvas is scaled (short/long/legacy)
show_mod_data_panel_hint: Whether to show the Mod Data panel
mod_data_default_int_hint: Default initial value for new counters
enable_texture_downsample_hint: Affects Live2D/PngRemix texture decoding: enable to reduce memory, disable to keep original sharpness
texture_downsample_start_dim_hint: Only downsample when max(texture width,height) ≥ this value; 0 = no limit
global_keyboard_hint: Enable to trigger keyboard events without focusing the animation window
global_mouse_hint: Enable to trigger global_click / global_right_click events when clicking anywhere
icon_hint: Optional, used for tray icon display (icon.ico)
states_triggers_desc: Manage character states, dialogue branches, and event response logic
event_global_click: Global left click (requires Global Mouse Listener)
event_global_click_up: Global left click up (requires Global Mouse Listener)
event_global_right_click: Global right click (requires Global Mouse Listener)
event_global_right_click_up: Global right click up (requires Global Mouse Listener)
event_global_keydown: Global key down (any key, requires Global Keyboard Listener)
event_global_keyup: Global key up (any key, requires Global Keyboard Listener)
assets_desc: Manage sequence animations and static image resources
bubble_desc: Configure dialogue bubble and branch button appearance (bubble_style.json)
bubble_enable_hint: When disabled, bubble_style.json will not be generated and default bubble style will be used
preview_text: This is a sample message to preview the bubble effect~
texts_desc: Manage multi-language texts and character info
text_speech_enable_hint: When disabled, text/<lang>/speech.json will not be generated
audio_speech_enable_hint: When disabled, audio/<lang>/speech.json will not be generated
msg_import_audio_need_folder: Please open the Mod from a folder to import audio files.
msg_import_audio_no_files: No audio files found under audio/<lang>/speech/.
msg_import_audio_failed: Import failed: folder not found or permission denied.
msg_import_assets_need_folder: Please open the Mod from a folder to import image assets.
msg_import_assets_failed: Import failed: folder not found or permission denied.
trigger_counter_hint: This state can trigger only when ModData.value is within [start, end]
trigger_temp_hint: This state can trigger only when environment.temperature (°C) is within [start, end]
trigger_uptime_hint: This state can trigger only when session uptime (minutes) >= trigger_uptime (0 = no limit)
trigger_weather_hint: This state can trigger only when environment.condition (or condition_code) exactly matches any item in trigger_weather (select none = no limit)
can_trigger_states_hint: Configure sub-states that can be randomly triggered and their weights
data_counter_hint: Operation to perform on Mod data when entering this state (e.g., affection +1)
live2d_params_hint: Set Live2D model parameters when entering this state (e.g., ParamAngleX, ParamEyeLOpen; choose target Parameter/PartOpacity)
persistent_state_hint: e.g., idle, music (leave empty for any state)
allow_repeat_hint: When off, the same state won't trigger twice in a row (only applies when group has >1 states)
event_name_hint: Common events: click, click_up, right_click, right_click_up, global_click, global_click_up, global_right_click, global_right_click_up, global_keydown, global_keyup, login, drag_start, drag_end, birthday, firstday, music_start, music_end, login_silence, keydown:Space, keyup:Space
trigger_groups_hint: Each group corresponds to a persistent state; states in the group can be triggered when the character is in that persistent state
msg_load_mod_first: Please load or create a Mod first
msg_browser_not_support: Your browser does not support folder access, please use Chrome/Edge
msg_mod_id_invalid: Mod ID can only contain letters, numbers and underscores
msg_export_sbuddy_tbuddy_saved: Saved as .tbuddy. Please use an external tool to convert it to .sbuddy
msg_confirm_delete_state: Are you sure you want to delete this state?
msg_enter_text_name: Please enter the text name first.
msg_state_same_name_exists: A state with the same name already exists.
msg_state_created_from_text: Created state with the same name.
msg_confirm_delete_asset: Are you sure you want to delete this asset?
msg_enter_lang_id: Please enter language ID (e.g., en, jp, zh)
msg_enter_event_name: Please enter event name (e.g., click, right_click, global_click, global_keydown, login, music_start)
msg_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete?
placeholder_trigger_event: e.g., click, right_click, global_click, global_keydown, login, music_start
msg_clipboard_empty: Clipboard is empty or invalid format
msg_confirm_delete_lang: Are you sure you want to delete language "{lang}"? This action cannot be undone.
mod_type_hint: Type cannot be changed after creation
assets_desc_live2d: Manage Live2D model config, motions, expressions and state-animation mappings
assets_desc_pngremix: PngRemix assets are managed by external .pngremix files. Please use PNGTuber Remix editor to edit them
live2d_base_dir_hint: Directory containing Live2D model files (relative to Mod root)
live2d_model_scale_hint: Overall scale for window preview (default 1; <1 shrinks)
live2d_resources_hint: Image resource files under the Live2D model directory, usable for key overlay layers and more
live2d_resource_audio_hint: Audio key name (matches audio/<lang>/speech.json name). Plays when the resource is shown.
live2d_resource_events_hint: Optional, associated trigger event names; any one event triggers this resource. Press Enter to add, supports multiple
live2d_states_hint: Map Mod state names to Live2D motions and expressions
msg_confirm_delete_motion: Are you sure you want to delete this motion?
msg_confirm_delete_expression: Are you sure you want to delete this expression?
msg_confirm_delete_resource: Are you sure you want to delete this resource?
msg_confirm_delete_live2d_state: Are you sure you want to delete this mapping?
placeholder_event_name: Type event name and press Enter…
msg_import_live2d_folder_need_folder: Please open the Mod from a folder to import files
msg_import_live2d_folder_confirm: All contents of folder "{folder}" will be copied to asset/live2d/. Existing files with the same name will be overwritten. Continue?
msg_import_live2d_folder_empty: The selected folder is empty, no files to copy
msg_sync_need_folder: Please open the Mod from a folder to sync files
msg_sync_need_base_dir: Please fill in the model base directory (base_dir) first
msg_sync_need_model_json: Please fill in the model definition file (model_json) first
msg_sync_config_confirm: This will auto-detect and fill model configuration (name, base_dir, physics, pose, textures, motions_dir, expressions_dir, eye_blink, lip_sync) from the Live2D directory. Current model config will be overwritten. Continue?
msg_sync_assets_confirm: This will re-read motions and expressions from model3.json based on the current model config. Current motion/expression lists will be overwritten (state mappings will be preserved). Continue?
msg_sync_model_not_found: Model file not found. Please check base_dir settings
msg_sync_no_model3_found: No .model3.json file found in the base_dir directory
msg_sync_choose_model3:
Multiple model files found. Please enter the filename to use:
{files}
msg_import_pngremix_need_folder: Please open the Mod from a folder to import .pngRemix files
msg_sync_no_pngremix_found: No .pngRemix file found in the Mod folder
msg_sync_choose_pngremix:
Multiple .pngRemix files found. Please enter the filename to use:
{files}
msg_sync_pngremix_file_not_found: No .pngRemix file found. Please check the .pngRemix file path
msg_pngremix_decoder_missing: PngRemix decoder script is not loaded. Please refresh the page or check mod-tool resources
msg_sync_pngremix_config_confirm: This will read and fill some config from the .pngRemix file (e.g., blink_speed/blink_chance). Current PngRemix config may be overwritten. Continue?
msg_sync_pngremix_assets_confirm: This will scan state count and hotkeys (saved_keys/saved_disappear) from the .pngRemix file and overwrite current expression/motion lists (state mappings will be preserved and best-effort filled). Continue?
msg_gen_keyboard_live2d_only: This feature is only available for Live2D type Mods
msg_gen_keyboard_no_cdi: No DisplayInfo (cdi3.json) reference found in model file, cannot identify parameter names
msg_gen_keyboard_no_params: No keyboard/key-related parameters found in cdi3.json
msg_gen_keyboard_success: Keyboard events generated: {states} new states, {triggers} new triggers ({params} key parameters total)
live2d_bg_layers_hint: Configure image layers rendered behind or in front of the Live2D model, for static backgrounds, key highlight overlays, etc.
bg_layer_layer_hint: "behind" renders behind the model (background), "front" renders in front (overlay)
bg_layer_events_hint: Optional, associated trigger event names; any one triggers layer visibility. Press Enter to add, leave empty for always visible
msg_confirm_delete_bg_layer: Are you sure you want to delete this layer?
pngremix_file_hint: .pngRemix binary model file path (relative to asset/ directory)
pngremix_default_state_hint: Initial display state index after model loads (starting from 0)
pngremix_model_scale_hint: Overall scale for window preview (default 1; <1 shrinks)
pngremix_max_fps_hint: Maximum frame rate for PngRemix rendering (0 = unlimited)
pngremix_blink_chance_hint: Blink trigger chance per check (1/N; N>=1; larger = less frequent)
pngremix_blink_hold_ratio_hint: Ratio of closed hold time to total blink time (0.0-1.0)
pngremix_expressions_hint: Switch between state indices to display different expressions. Each expression corresponds to a state_index
pngremix_motions_hint: Hotkey-triggered motion switches. Each motion can be bound to an F1-F9 hotkey
pngremix_states_hint: Map Mod state names to PngRemix expressions and motions
msg_confirm_delete_pngremix_expression: Are you sure you want to delete this expression?
msg_confirm_delete_pngremix_motion: Are you sure you want to delete this motion?
msg_confirm_delete_pngremix_state: Are you sure you want to delete this mapping?
pngremix_params_hint: Switch PngRemix expression or trigger motion when entering this state
assets_desc_threed: Manage 3D (VRM/PMX) model config, animations, and state mappings
threed_model_file_hint: Model file path (relative to Mod root)
threed_animation_base_dir_hint: Optional, directory containing animation files (e.g. asset/3d/animations)
threed_states_hint: Map Mod state names to 3D animations
threed_state_scale_hint: Leave empty to use model default scale
msg_confirm_delete_threed_animation: Are you sure you want to delete this animation?
msg_confirm_delete_threed_state: Are you sure you want to delete this mapping?
msg_sync_threed_config_confirm: This will auto-detect .vrm/.pmx model files in the asset/3d/ directory and fill model configuration (name, type, file). Current model config will be overwritten. Continue?
msg_sync_threed_assets_confirm: This will scan all .vrma/.vmd animation files in the asset/3d/ directory and regenerate the animation list. Current animation list will be overwritten. Continue?
msg_sync_threed_no_vrm_found: No .vrm/.pmx model file found in the asset/3d/ directory
msg_sync_threed_no_vrma_found: No .vrma/.vmd animation file found in the asset/3d/ directory
msg_sync_threed_choose_vrm:
Multiple model files found. Please enter the filename to use:
{files}
msg_sync_threed_dir_not_found: asset/3d/ directory not found. Please check the Mod directory structure
msg_params_live2d_only: This feature is only available for Live2D type Mods
msg_params_no_display_info: DisplayInfo (cdi3.json) path not found in model3.json
params_browser_hint: Display all Live2D model parameters defined in cdi3.json, grouped and collapsible
params_browser_placeholder: Click "Load from File" to load model parameter info
trigger_weather_no_limit: (No restriction: do not select any item)
